ValidationRule.description: Without Job Number, ASO/SO can not be released
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote', RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), OR(ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'ASO Released'),ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'SO Released')), ISBLANK( CONTAINER_Job__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can not Release ASO or Release SO before job number allocation
